sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7507" key="a)nastala/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναστᾰλάω</orth>, <sense id="n7507.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make trickle forth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:324" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.324</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
